# Brief & Problem

## Original brief

> Give the team a quicker way to catch pipeline problems early. Something lightweight.

The task as handed over, before any reframing.

## Restated problem

The team lacks a mid-pipeline checkpoint: problems surface only at handoff, when they are expensive
to fix. The true problem is early, cheap visibility — not another report.

## Guiding principle

Catch it while it is still cheap.
